PROVIDES_INSURANCE: Provides insurance coverage for future protection
PROVIDES_INCOME_SUPPORT: Provides direct income support to farmers
PROVIDES_ADVISORY: Provides advisory and soil health guidance
QUICK_ACCESS: Quick access to working capital for next crop season
PRIORITY_LENDING: Priority lending for small and marginal farmers
FLEXIBLE_CREDIT: Flexible credit with low documentation and insurance coverage
LOW_INTEREST: Low interest rates with government subsidy
SUITABLE_FOR_RECOVERY: Suitable for crop recovery and rehabilitation
MISS_ADVISORY: Applicable if you avail a short-term crop loan or KCC and repay on time
AGTL_ADVISORY: Available through banks; eligibility depends on bank policies and credit history
SYSTEM_DISCLAIMER: This is an advisory system only. Final eligibility and approval depend on government authorities and financial institutions. Farmers must verify current scheme details from official government portals before applying.
SYSTEM_NOTE: This system does not collect Aadhaar, bank account numbers, or biometric data. It does not process or submit applications.
SCHEME_DISCLAIMER: Final eligibility and approval depend on government authorities and financial institutions.
LOAN_DISCLAIMER: Final eligibility and approval depend on government authorities and financial institutions.
STATE_RELIEF_INTRO: Available in select states with dedicated crop loss compensation:
VISIT_OFFICIAL_PORTAL: For complete details and latest updates, visit the official government portal.
